commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2f0287d48bae82804d7f9fb01e626b801ffb434e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a reusable GitHub Actions workflow for publishing skills, expands `clawhub sync` with CI-oriented JSON, owner, source provenance, and exact-root options, and documents the workflow usage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a current-main bug: this is a new feature PR. The review findings are source-reproducible from the PR head plus the empty `v1` tag lookup.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor or maintainer action for private canary proof and a stable workflow-ref decision, so it is not a safe auto-repair lane.

target.title: feat: add reusable skill publish workflow
target.body:
## Summary
- add a reusable `.github/workflows/skill-publish.yml` for ClawHub skill publishing
- extend `clawhub sync` with CI-friendly JSON/dry-run/source provenance/owner support
- document GitHub Actions skill publishing and catalog-style usage

## Canary proof
Validated against the private canary repo `openclaw/clawhub-skill-publish-canary` from a temporary caller branch pointing at this PR branch:

- Catalog dry-run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub-skill-publish-canary/actions/runs/26691839008
  - JSON artifact roots: `.../clawhub-skill-publish-canary/skills`
  - `wouldPublish`: `catalog-alpha`, `catalog-beta`, `single-path`
- Single-skill dry-run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub-skill-publish-canary/actions/runs/26691840247
  - JSON artifact roots: `.../clawhub-skill-publish-canary/skills/single-path`
  - `wouldPublish`: `single-path`
- No-owner dry-run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub-skill-publish-canary/actions/runs/26691841733
  - JSON artifact has `owner: null`
  - `wouldPublish`: `catalog-alpha`, `catalog-beta`, `single-path`

## Verification
- `actionlint .github/workflows/skill-publish.yml`
- `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub test:src -- src/cli/commands/sync.test.ts`
- `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub verify`
- `bun run ci:static`
- Local exact-root dry-run against `openclaw/clawhub-skill-publish-canary`
- Local missing-root check with `--no-clawdbot-roots` fails closed instead of scanning fallback roots
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
